title: freirea andina
intro: Freirea andina is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to the Andes mountains in South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Freirea andina include its ability to reduce fever, relieve congestion, and soothe sore throats. Traditional herbal preparations of Freirea andina include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves or roots of the plant in hot water or a solvent.
